revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) FLIP the cherry_pick_moments[0] (ts 00:35) primary/alternative read — the alternative hypothesis (deferral is appropriate at this call stage) is the stronger read; the coaching implication should move the failure attribution to the exit at 02:16, not the 00:35 deferral. (2) ADD a cherry_pick_moment for ts 01:47 ('Yeah. So our credit kinda got hit a little bit recently') classified as vulnerability_disclosure — the schema's empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure directive applies here and Bucky's non-response is a missed coaching moment that Stage 3 omitted entirely. (3) CORRECT the codex_reference in cherry_pick_moments[3] from 'context.lead_types_and_bill_collection_rules / analysis_directives.conditional_booking_detection' to 'analysis_directives.soft_outcome_distinction / dq_rules.credit_below_670_no_alternative.' Secondary: soften 'grasping' language in cherry_pick_moments[2] stewart_read to reflect a misfire on a recognizable strategy rather than pure improvisation, and remove the fabricated '10 seconds' time estimate from cherry_pick_moments[1] alternative_hypothesis dismissal.
